children.heading: .—Authority
children.label: a .—Authority
children.text: The Secretary may provide a program of vocational training to an eligible child if the Secretary determines that the achievement of a vocational goal by the child is reasonably feasible.

children.heading: .—Applicable Provisions
children.label: b .—Applicable Provisions
children.text: Subsections (b) through (e) of shall apply with respect to any program of vocational training provided under subsection (a).section 1804 of this title
